title.ar: الدعاء بين الركن اليماني والحجر الأسود
title.en: Invocation to be recited between the Yemenite Corner and the Black Stone

items.arabicText: ((﴿رَبَّنَا آتِنَا فِي الدُّنْيَا حَسَنَةً وَفِي الْآخِرَةِ حَسَنَةً وَقِنَا عَذَابَ النَّارِ﴾)).

translations.en: The Prophet PBUH used to say between the Yemeni corner and the black stone: (O our Lord, grant us the best in this life and the best in the next life, and protect us from the punishment of the Fire.)
